# Contributing guidelines

Contributions are welcomed!

## Project limits

`mkdocs-shadcn` is not, and won't be `mkdocs-material`.
The spirit of the project is to support common markdown features + extra extensions or plugins we can't see in the wild.
The output should stick to the documentation site of [ui/shadcn](https://ui.shadcn.com/docs).

## Workflow

Once you have a bug, an idea or anything else related to the project, you can contribute following this simple steps.

1. Check if the topic has not already been treated in [previous issues](https://github.com/asiffer/mkdocs-shadcn/issues?q=is%3Aissue).
2. If nothing is related, just [**open an issue**](https://github.com/asiffer/mkdocs-shadcn/issues)** so we can discuss your problem (even behind an enhancement there is a problem :relaxed:)
3. After discussion we can plan to "fix" it (or close it).
4. If you feel comfortable enough, you can then fork the repo and submit a PR! (by submitting a pull request, you agree that your contributions will be licensed under the [same license as the project](../LICENSE))

## Developing

Look at the [README](../README.md#developers).
